# Ceratec Group
> A trusted real estate and construction group in Pune, Maharashtra, India with over 26 years of experience. Specialising in residential flats (2BHK, 3BHK, 4BHK) and commercial office spaces in Hinjewadi, Ravet, Maan, and Balewadi.

## About
- Founded: 2000 (26 years in Pune real estate)
- Builder type: Developer and constructor
- Areas served: Hinjewadi, Ravet, Maan, Balewadi, Pune
- Families served: 5,000+
- Projects completed: 12+

## Ongoing Projects

### Presidential Tower — Residential (Ongoing)
- Location: Ravet, Pune
- Configuration: 2 BHK, 3 BHK, 4 BHK flats and Row Houses
- Land area: 4.5 acres
- Status: Under construction
- URL: https://ceratecgroup.com/presidential-tower

### Westwinds — Residential (Ongoing)
- Location: Maan, Hinjewadi, Pune
- Configuration: 2 BHK to 5.5 BHK Airy Homes and Duplexes
- Land area: 5.5 acres
- Status: Under construction
- URL: https://ceratecgroup.com/west-winds

### Tower 108 — Commercial (Ongoing)
- Location: Balewadi, Pune
- Configuration: Office spaces from 500 sq.ft to 1,470 sq.ft
- Land area: 1.5 acres
- Status: Under construction
- URL: https://ceratecgroup.com/tower-108
